diagnoses.name: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS)
diagnoses.evidence_span: Patient is a gentleman with known amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS)

diagnoses.name: Acute respiratory failure with hypoxia
diagnoses.evidence_span: presented with acute decompensation requiring intubation and mechanical ventilation

diagnoses.name: Chronic respiratory failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: He has dependence on a ventilator with underlying chronic respiratory failure

diagnoses.name: Ventilator-associated pneumonia (VAP)
diagnoses.evidence_span: During this admission, he developed ventilator-associated pneumonia (VAP)

diagnoses.name: Pneumonia due to Pseudomonas
diagnoses.evidence_span: ventilator-associated pneumonia (VAP) complicated by Pseudomonas aeruginosa and E. coli organisms cultured from respiratory secretions

diagnoses.name: Non-ST elevation myocardial infarction (NSTEMI)
diagnoses.evidence_span: the patient suffered a non-ST elevation myocardial infarction (NSTEMI) during his hospital course, likely related to demand ischemia

diagnoses.name: Acute kidney failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: He experienced acute kidney failure, attributed in part to nephropathy induced by medications

diagnoses.name: Acute pyelonephritis
diagnoses.evidence_span: concurrent acute pyelonephritis and urinary tract infection secondary to E. coli

diagnoses.name: Urinary tract infection secondary to E. coli
diagnoses.evidence_span: urinary tract infection secondary to E. coli

diagnoses.name: Metabolic encephalopathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also developed altered mental status consistent with encephalopathy of unclear etiology, though infectious and metabolic etiologies were considered

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus
diagnoses.evidence_span: His underlying type 2 diabetes mellitus was managed throughout admission

diagnoses.name: Schizoaffective disorder, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: long-standing history of schizoaffective disorder, unspecified, which complicated his hospital course

diagnoses.name: Adverse effect of penicillins
diagnoses.evidence_span: He developed a rash consistent with adverse effect from penicillins which occurred early in his hospital stay

diagnoses.name: Ventilator dependence
diagnoses.evidence_span: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) with ventilator dependence

procedures.name: Intubation and mechanical ventilation
procedures.evidence_span: Patient was intubated and placed on mechanical ventilation for greater than 96 consecutive hours due to respiratory failure

procedures.name: Percutaneous central venous catheter insertion into superior vena cava
procedures.evidence_span: A percutaneous central venous catheter was inserted into the superior vena cava for reliable vascular access and medication administration

procedures.name: Tracheostomy care
procedures.evidence_span: Tracheostomy care was provided with attention to proper tube positioning and management

procedures.name: Ventilator adjustment and management
procedures.evidence_span: Devices including ventilator settings and other specified respiratory equipment were fitted and adjusted multiple times throughout the stay

medications.name: Aspirin
medications.evidence_span: Chronic aspirin use documented; patient on long-term aspirin therapy
